title: pyrrosia subfissa
intro: Pyrrosia subfissa, also known as the small-leaved pyrrosia or small-leaved polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pyrrosia subfissa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Pyrrosia subfissa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies and formulations.
